name: Stir Fry Crab & Oriental Greens =20
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the vegetables by cutting them into 4-inch lengths.
2. Heat a pan with 2 cups of water and 1/2 teaspoon salt until boiling.
3. Add the greens to the pan and cook for 1 minute, then remove and drain.
4. Arrange the cooked vegetables on a serving platter.
5. Heat a wok and add 3 tablespoons of oil. Continue heating until very hot.
6. Add the minced green onion and ginger; stir-fry until fragrant.
7. Add the crab meat to the pan and stir-fry gently.
8. Stir in the cooking wine and chicken broth, bringing the mixture to a boil.
9. Mix 1 teaspoon of cornstarch with 1 tablespoon of water.
10. Add this mixture to the crab sauce and cook briefly until thickened.
11. Beat the egg white until frothy.
12. Slowly add the beaten egg white to the crab mixture, stirring constantly to prevent it from setting immediately.
13. If desired, add an additional tablespoon of oil for a glossy finish.
14. Remove from heat and pour over the cooked vegetables.
15. Serve with hot steamed rice. Optionally, use scallops in place of crab meat.
